target_client.website_status: Static WordPress - Slider Revolution + Owl Carousel + Swiper.js. Zero cinematic motion.

sprint_goal: Build a cinematic homepage concept as an open-book pitch.

DONE: Section 2 - The Hero (Update Scene 1 text, hard cut gradient)

phase_6_summary.notes: Component-driven development without a master scroll storyboard led to disjointed pacing. User brought in a complete structural Master Design Director critique.

notes: CONTEXT HYGIENE APPLIED. Sections 1-4 are complete. The overarching color palette was successfully pivoted to a Light Theme (Limestone & Espresso) using the workflow-impeccable-colorize system. Images were optimized and accessibility contrast was hardened. The next session MUST focus exclusively on Section 5: The Team, driven by the AI transcripts the user will provide.
key_decisions: Adopted a new 6-section emotional arc architecture (xbd_homepage_architecture.md) as the absolute source of truth.
Transition format changed to a fixed WebGL simplex shader overlay that unmounts completely after an event-triggered GSAP dissolve timeline.
Pivoted entirely to a Light Theme (Limestone #F7F5F2 & Espresso #2C2621) due to Tailwind v4 fallback accident, proving superior to the previous dark theme.
Removed bottom gradient on Hero video to force a hard, organic cut into the Philosophy Bridge.
blockers: Awaiting AI transcripts of reference websites from the user for The Team section animation mechanics.
Awaiting project photographs for Team portraits.
